mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS friendshipId, u.id AS friendUserId, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.username, f.create_time AS friendSince FROM user_friendship f JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = CASE WHEN f.user_id = #{userId} THEN f.friend_id ELSE f.user_id END WHERE f.status = 1 AND (f.user_id = #{userId} OR f.friend_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY f.update_time DESC

SELECT f.id AS requestId, u.id AS fromUserId, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.username, f.create_time AS requestTime FROM user_friendship f JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = f.user_id WHERE f.friend_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 0 ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
